subject: EVS
question: On a cold night, Reena wrapped one plant in a plastic sheet and left another open. In the morning she saw water droplets only on the plastic sheet. Which process best explains this?
why_it_matters: Children chose evaporation. The droplets form by condensation, water vapour turning to liquid on the cool sheet.

subject: Science
question: ଜଣେ ଛାତ୍ର ଏକ ପରୀକ୍ଷଣ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରି ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରିବାକୁ ଚାହାଁନ୍ତି ଯେ ଏକ ସବୁଜ ପତ୍ର କ୍ଲୋରୋଫିଲ୍ ସାହାଯ୍ୟରେ ଖାଦ୍ୟ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ କରିଛି କି ନାହିଁ । କେଉଁଟି ସୋପାନଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସଠିକ୍ କ୍ରମ ଅଟେ?
why_it_matters: Children picked 'keep it in sunlight', confusing the plant's need for light with the starch-test procedure, which begins by boiling the leaf.

subject: Odia
question: ଜଙ୍ଗଲ କ୍ଷୟ ର ମୂଖ୍ୟ କାରଣ କଣ ହୋଇଛି?
why_it_matters: Deforestation was blamed on factories and industry. The main cause is clearing forest to expand farmland.

subject: Science
question: ନିମ୍ନରେ ଥିବା ଦୂରତା-ସମୟ ଗ୍ରାଫ୍ ଜଣେ ସାଇକେଲ ଚାଳକଙ୍କ ଗତିକୁ ଦର୍ଶାଏ । 4 ରୁ 6 ସେକେଣ୍ଡ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସମତଳ ଭୂସମାନ୍ତର ରେଖା କ'ଣ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ୱ କରେ?
why_it_matters: A flat line on a distance-time graph was read as 'moving at a steady speed'. A flat line there means the cyclist has stopped.

subject: Odia
question: “କଲମର କାହାଣୀ” ଅନୁଛେଦ ଦ୍ୱାରା ମାନବ ପ୍ରଗତି ବିଷୟରେ କେଉଁ ବିଶାଳ ଧାରଣାକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରାଯାଇଛି?
why_it_matters: Children picked an absolute statement (new technology fully replaces the old) over the passage's nuanced idea that steady, ongoing innovation keeps improving life.

subject: SST
question: ପାହାଡିଆ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ବାନାଗ୍ନି ସାଧାରଣ କାରଣ କେଉଁଟି ?
why_it_matters: Forest fires were blamed on lightning. The common cause in hilly areas is an unextinguished campfire, that is, human carelessness.

subject: Odia
question: ଲେଖା ଆଧାରରେ, ସବୁଠାରୁ ଯୁକ୍ତିସଙ୍ଗତ ମତ କେଉଁଟି?
why_it_matters: Children chose a general fairness statement over the inference the passage supports, that protected forest area stays too low even as forest cover rises.

subject: English
question: Which home action best mirrors banning old polluting vehicles?
why_it_matters: Children chose a generally 'green' action rather than the true parallel to scrapping old polluting vehicles, which is replacing old devices with energy-saving ones.

why_it_matters: Children think a sea turtle's life begins in the ocean; it actually hatches on the beach. A read-from-text slip.

question: ଜଣେ ଶିକ୍ଷକଙ୍କର ୫ ଟି ଭିନ୍ନ ଭିନ୍ନ କାର୍ଡ ଅଛି: ♠ A, ♠2, ♠3, ♠4, ଏବଂ ♠5 ନିମ୍ନରେ ଦର୍ଶାଯାଇଛି । ସେ ବୋର୍ଡରେ ଗୋଟିଏ ଧାଡିରେ ଏହି କାର୍ଡଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୩ ଟି ସଜାଇବାକୁ ଚାହୁଁଛନ୍ତି। କେତୋଟି ଭିନ୍ନ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ସମ୍ଭବ ହେବ?
why_it_matters: Children counted combinations instead of permutations, ignoring that the order of the cards matters.

subject: Maths
question: ଜଣେ ଚିତ୍ରକାର ୪ ଲିଟର ଧଳା ରଙ୍ଗ, ୨.୫ ଲିଟର ଲାଲ୍ ରଙ୍ଗ ଏବଂ ୫୦୦ ମିଲିଲିଟର ନୀଳ ରଙ୍ଗ ମିଶ୍ରଣ କରନ୍ତି । ଏହି ରଙ୍ଗ ମିଶ୍ରଣ ପାଇଁ ସବୁଠାରୁ ସରଳ ଅନୁପାତ କ'ଣ?
why_it_matters: Children wrote the raw amounts as the ratio (4:2.5:0.5) instead of converting to one unit and simplifying to whole numbers (8:5:1). Converting units and simplifying ratios is the gap.

question: ୧୮୦୦ ଦଶକରେ, କାରିଗରମାନେ କୁଶଳୀ ହୋଇଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅନେକ ଭାରତୀୟ ହସ୍ତତନ୍ତ/ହସ୍ତଶିଳ୍ପ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ସଙ୍କୁଚିତ ହେବାକୁ ଲାଗିଲା । କେଉଁ କାରଣ ଏହି ଅବନତିକୁ ସର୍ବୋତ୍ତମ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା କରେ?
why_it_matters: Children blamed higher taxes; the main cause was cheap, plentiful British mill-made cloth out-competing Indian handlooms.

why_it_matters: Children chose evaporation. The droplets form by condensation, water vapour turning to liquid on the cool sheet.

why_it_matters: A flat line on a distance-time graph was read as 'moving at a steady speed'. A flat line there means the cyclist has stopped.

subject: Science
question: ଜଣେ ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ରାସ୍ତା ଉପରେ ଥିବା ପାଣିର ଖାଲରୁ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟର ଆଲୋକ ପ୍ରତିଫଳିତ ହେଉଥିବା ଦେଖିଲେ। ଏହି ପ୍ରତିଫଳନ କେଉଁ ନିୟମ ଦ୍ୱାରା ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା ହୁଏ?
